title: Problem Discovery Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger problem discovery foundations judgment so product work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Problem Discovery Foundations is a leverage point inside product. It supports the broader goal of what to build, what not to build, and how to ship it.
coreConcepts: Problem Discovery Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good problem discovery foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Problem Discovery Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
